theme.name: The Aetherium Distillery
theme.setting_summary: A small alchemical workshop. Practice routing essence between alembics.

acts.title: First Distillation
acts.intro_text: The alembic warms. Lead {{essence}} through the runic lattice to the awaiting {{phial}}.
acts.outro_text: The {{phial}} fills. The work is begun.

puzzles.title: Lead {{essence}} to {{phial}}
puzzles.briefing: Route {{essence}} from the {{alembic}} on the left to the {{phial}} on the right.

ending.good: The {{essence}} flows. The mentor nods, and you understand the {{phial}} a little better than before.
ending.neutral: The work is done, for now.
